title: Language update notifications
scenario: Language update notification appears when app is backgrounded during firmware update on Poly headset
steps: Pair and connect the headset to the mobile device
Open the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings
Observe the popup window that appears
Observe the "Software update - Three easy steps" screen with animation
Put the app in the background during the update
Check for a notification showing "device update is in progress"
Wait for the update to complete
Check for a notification that the device is updated
expected: A popup window appears, followed by a "Software update - Three easy steps" screen with animation. When the app is put in the background during the update, a notification showing "device update is in progress" appears. Upon successful update, a notification that the device is updated is displayed.
